descripcion: Summary of the cases and results published by Codeplex Software. Grupo DGD is an authorized implementation partner in Peru; we are documenting our own cases with written client authorization before publishing them here.

filtros.ctaModal: I want a case like this

items.desc: Case published by Codeplex: ContaPlex rollout to automate records, electronic books and reports. Documented impact: 40% less time on accounting management and 50% fewer errors at month-end close.
Case published by Codeplex: GestiónPlex rollout for multi-warehouse inventory, valued kardex and treasury. Documented impact: 35% reduction in warehouse operating costs.
Case published by Codeplex: SUNAT Invoicing deployment with included digital certificate and automatic XML/PDF/CDR delivery. Documented impact: 70% reduction in document processing time.
Case published by Codeplex: official reseller program — which Grupo DGD is part of. Documented impact by Codeplex: 60% revenue uplift for partners scaling with the suite.

cta.titulo: Want to be our next documented case?
cta.descripcion: Book a session with our consultants and let's design your digitalization plan with the Codeplex suite.
